title: DelayWithProgressNodeOutput
description: Output for core.openwop.examples.delay-with-progress. Returns the actual delay achieved (which may differ slightly from configured delayMs due to event-loop quantization).

actualDelayMs.description: Wall-clock delay achieved in milliseconds. MAY exceed config.delayMs by a small amount; SHOULD NOT undershoot.

tickCount.description: Number of node.progress events emitted during the delay.
